One infolist entry is shipped. It calls
language-php shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight

use Relaticle\ActivityLog\Filament\Infolists\Components\ActivityLog;

ActivityLog::make('activity')
    ->heading('Activity')
    ->groupByDate()                  // bucket by today / this week / older (default: true)
    ->perPage(20)                    // Livewire page size (default: 3)
    ->emptyState('No activity yet.') // custom empty-state message
    ->infiniteScroll(true)           // false renders a "Load more" button (default: true)
    ->columnSpanFull();
// bucket by today / this week / older (default: true)
// false renders a "Load more" button (default: true)
fluent flag switches the bottom control:
sentinel; the next page loads automatically as the user scrolls (Livewire 4).
A read-only relation manager renders the activity log as a tab on the resource's view/edit page:
relationship so it doesn't write to the DB - the page just hosts the Livewire component.
properties, overridden from a service provider:

ActivityLogRelationManager::$groupByDate    = true; // bucket by today / this week / older
ActivityLogRelationManager::$perPage        = 20;   // Livewire page size
ActivityLogRelationManager::$infiniteScroll = true; // false renders a "Load more" button
// bucket by today / this week / older
Static config fits the RelationManager registration model - one class per resource, configured once at boot. Subclass if you need per-resource variants.
Show the activity log in a slide-over modal from any resource table or page header:
The action opens a 2XL slide-over with the Livewire component. Customize label/icon/modal width as with any Filament action.
